author: Alex S
subject: fix(Index): missing parameters / props (algolia/vue-instantsearch#502)
body:
* fix(Index): replace appId&apiKey by searchClient

* feat(Index): add missing parameters

* docs: clarify props and make more consistent

* feat: correctly pass props, remove searchParams

* test: add one

* fix: use searchFunction in template

* chore: fix lint

* chore: make limitation clearer

* fix: do not remove widget that don't implement dispose

* fix: avoid dispose when instantsearch is not completely instanciated

* test(component): only widgets with `dispose` will get removed

* fix: prevent unmounting widget if IS is not started
